description.value: You become invisible and gain the Hidden condition, while simultaneously creating an illusory double of yourself that appears where you were standing. You have Fortune on Stealth checks and observers have Misfortune on Perception checks to detect your true location. Can use action to move the double up to twice your speed and make it gesture, speak, and behave however you wish.

system.effect: You become invisible and gain the Hidden condition, while simultaneously creating an illusory double of yourself that appears where you were standing. You have Fortune on Stealth checks and observers have Misfortune on Perception checks to detect your true location. Can use action to move the double up to twice your speed and make it gesture, speak, and behave however you wish.
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
